scope: Cozma Vasile real-estate site full-functionality audit + best-practices alignment

subQuestions.topic: Romania real-estate market norms 2025-2026 — required/expected fields on a property listing
subQuestions.deliverable: List of fields currently missing from src/content.config.ts that RO buyers/sellers expect (per Storia.ro / Imobiliare.ro / OLX Imobiliare schemas)

subQuestions.topic: Listing card + detail page UX 2025-2026 + Schema.org RealEstateListing completeness
subQuestions.deliverable: Card hierarchy + detail-page section order best practices; full Schema.org JSON-LD field set used by Google Rich Results for real-estate

subQuestions.topic: Sveltia/Decap CMS UX patterns for non-technical real-estate agents
subQuestions.deliverable: Patterns for: field grouping (collections), inline hints, image upload+crop, draft preview, batch ops, validation feedback. Identify what causes most errors for non-technical users.

successCriteria: Schema in content.config.ts extended with all RO-market expected fields
Detail page renders each new field conditionally (no empty placeholders)
Filter UI extended for filterable fields (energy class, parking, heating where applicable)
Search blob includes new searchable fields
CMS config.yml has hints on every non-obvious field, field grouping via collapsible sections where supported
Build: 0 errors / 0 warnings, all 27 properties validate
Zero placeholders, TODO, fake data, Lorem ipsum
Property cards remain visually clean — added info is on detail page, not card
